description: A portrait-format graphic with three darkened side-by-side photographs across the top: a young man in a graduation cap and gown beside an older woman, two women embracing, and a woman in glasses speaking at a microphone with a Morin name placard. Large white serif text below reads THIS IS OUR WHY, followed by a paragraph noting Mother's Day and mothers who advocate for loved ones lost to violent illegal alien crime. A small Department of Homeland Security seal sits at the bottom.
notable_text: THIS IS OUR WHY; As families across the nation observe Mother's Day, we recognize the courage of mothers who advocate for loved ones lost to violent illegal alien crime
